one_time_description: Settlement revenue of $1,662,735 received during the year (down from $13,063,978 in prior year)
economic_notes: Nation holds 25% interest in Oldman River Hydro Joint Venture (equity basis). Also has interest in Piikani Transmission Holdings Limited Partnership. Nation has Alberta Electrical Connection Operator's License. Economic dependence noted (note 12).
notes: Consolidated entity includes 14 subsidiaries plus equity investment in Oldman River Hydro Joint Venture (25% interest, equity method) and Piikani Transmission Holdings Limited Partnership. Current liabilities calculated as bank indebtedness ($1,163,544) plus accounts payable and accrued liabilities ($3,575,567). Settlement revenue dropped significantly from $13M prior year to $1.6M current year. ISC-FNIHB revenue was $4,699,850 in prior year but nil in current year - may be reclassified into ISC line. COVID-19 pandemic noted (note 23). Total revenue per statement of operations is $45,177,761 after deferred revenue adjustment of -$956,775.
